---
title: &TITLE Eduardo Alejandro Arrieta Donato
last: Arrieta
first: Eduardo
people_group: understudent
email: "earrieta@lcg.unam.mx"
education:
  - BSc Student in Genomic Sciences | UNAM
subtitle: Undergraduate Student 
description: ""
bio: "I have a Bsc in Genomic Sciences from the Genomic Sciences undergraduate program at UNAM, specializing in paleogenomic and phylogenetic analysis.

I am currently working in paleogenomic and population genomics projects at the International Laboratory for Human Genome Research (LIIGH-UNAM), as part of the Paleogenomics and Evolutionary Biology group, under the supervision of Dr. Federico Sánchez Quinto.

I am experienced in evolutionary analysis using mammoth mitogenomes (Mammuthus columbi), and have advanced training in Python programming.

I am quite interested in impulse paleogenomics frontiers into aquatic environments projects."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:earrieta@lcg.unam.mx
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
